subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: This is the Day of hearkening. Hearken ye unto the Voice of the All-Merciful that calleth from the Axis of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید الیوم یوم اصغا است بشنوید ندای رحمن را که در قطب اکوان
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @high station of the true believer, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
